sentences.text: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services.
However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family.
Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy.
Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before.
So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try.
It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own.
I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences.
I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about.
At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself.
But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story.
It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself.
There was nothing to distract me!
This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone.
After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: the importance of choosing movies based on one's own taste rather than critics' reviews
the differences between watching movies at home and in a theater
the negative effects of relying too much on streaming services for entertainment
the benefits of developing a wider range of interests in film genres
the personal growth that comes from doing something alone for the first time
problems.explanation: 글쓴이가 처음으로 혼자 영화관에 가는 도전을 통해 혼자만의 활동도 즐길 수 있다는 것을 깨닫고, 앞으로 스스로 선택하겠다고 다짐하는 내용이므로 '처음 혼자 무언가를 하면서 얻는 개인적 성장'이 주제이다. ②는 영화 선택 기준, ③은 집과 극장 비교, ④는 스트리밍 서비스 부정적 효과, ⑤는 영화 장르 관심 확대로 본문의 핵심과 다르다.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 요지로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: Watching movies alone is always more enjoyable than watching them with others.
People should avoid following other people's preferences when making decisions.
Historical dramas are more intellectually stimulating than action or science fiction films.
Streaming services have made it unnecessary to visit movie theaters in person.
Stepping out of one's comfort zone can lead to unexpected satisfaction and self-discovery.
problems.explanation: 글쓴이가 한 번도 해본 적 없는 혼자 영화관 가기를 시도하여 예상치 못한 만족감과 자기 발견을 경험했으므로, '안전지대 밖으로 나가면 뜻밖의 만족과 자기 발견을 얻을 수 있다'가 요지이다. ①은 '항상'이라는 극단적 표현, ②는 타인 선호 무시, ④는 장르 비교, ⑤는 스트리밍과 극장 비교로 본문 요지와 다르다.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 제목으로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: Why Streaming Services Are Replacing Movie Theaters
Alone in the Dark: Finding Joy in a Solo Movie Experience
The Art of Compromise: Choosing Movies with Friends and Family
Action vs. Drama: A Comparative Study of Film Genres
How to Overcome Social Anxiety in Public Spaces
problems.explanation: 혼자 영화관에 가는 도전에서 예상 밖의 즐거움을 발견한 이야기이므로 '혼자 영화 경험에서 기쁨을 찾다'가 가장 적절하다. ②는 스트리밍 vs 극장, ③은 타협, ④는 장르 비교, ⑤는 사회적 불안으로 본문과 맞지 않는다.

problems.instruction: 밑줄 친 부분이 의미하는 바로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. <u>Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy.</u> Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: The writer's friends and family prefer to watch movies at home rather than at the theater.
The writer has always chosen movies based on the preferences of those around them.
Action and science fiction movies are generally considered the best genres for group viewing.
The writer's companions determine the genre, so the writer rarely gets to pick freely.
The writer's friends and family dislike historical dramas and refuse to watch them.
problems.explanation: 친구나 가족이 좋아하는 종류의 영화를 같이 보게 된다는 것은, 동행인이 장르를 결정하므로 글쓴이가 자유롭게 고르지 못한다는 의미이다. ①은 집에서 보는 것을 선호한다는 왜곡, ②는 '항상'이라는 과도한 해석, ④는 근거 없는 일반화, ⑤는 역사 드라마를 거부한다는 언급이 없다.

problems.instruction: 밑줄 친 부분이 의미하는 바로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. <u>I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences.</u> I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: Being free from the need to consider others' tastes was a refreshing relief.
The writer found it stressful to be entirely responsible for every decision.
The writer realized that other people's opinions about movies are not worth considering.
The writer usually avoids conflict by not expressing personal preferences at all.
Not having companions meant the writer felt isolated and indifferent about the movie choice.
problems.explanation: 타인의 취향을 신경 쓸 필요가 없었다는 것은 혼자이기에 남의 선호를 고려하지 않아도 되는 상쾌한 해방감을 뜻한다. ①은 스트레스로 반대 해석, ③은 타인 의견 무가치라는 극단적 해석, ④는 갈등 회피, ⑤는 고립감·무관심으로 본문과 다르다.

problems.instruction: 밑줄 친 부분이 의미하는 바로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so <u>I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about</u>. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: The writer selected a genre that had always been a shared favorite with friends.
The writer took advantage of being alone to explore a personal interest previously set aside.
The writer picked a film that matched the usual action or science fiction preference.
The writer chose the historical drama because it was the only option available at the time.
The writer regretted the choice because the historical drama turned out to be disappointing.
problems.explanation: 평소 친구·가족과 함께할 때는 볼 수 없었던, 이전부터 궁금했던 역사 드라마를 혼자이기에 선택할 수 있었다는 뜻이다. ①은 공유 취향, ②는 평소 선호 장르, ④는 유일한 선택지, ⑤는 후회로 본문 내용과 다르다.

problems.instruction: 밑줄 친 "There was nothing to distract me!"가 의미하는 바로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. <u>There was nothing to distract me!</u> This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: The theater was empty, so there were no other audience members making noise.
Being alone meant there were no companions to pull the writer's attention away from the film.
The movie's plot was so simple that it required no effort to follow.
The writer turned off all electronic devices before the movie began.
The historical drama lacked any exciting scenes that could break the writer's concentration.
problems.explanation: 혼자 왔기 때문에 옆 사람 때문에 집중이 흐트러질 일이 없었다는 의미이다. ①은 빈 극장, ②는 단순한 줄거리, ④는 전자기기 끄기, ⑤는 자극적 장면 부재로 본문 맥락과 다르다.

problems.instruction: 밑줄 친 부분으로부터 추론할 수 있는 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. <u>After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.</u>
choices: The writer plans to stop watching movies with friends and family entirely.
The writer believes that everyone should always do things alone for personal growth.
The writer will only watch historical dramas from now on.
The writer intends to pursue solo activities and independent decision-making going forward.
The writer regrets not having tried going to the theater alone much earlier.
problems.explanation: 앞으로 스스로 선택하고 혼자 하는 활동을 더 즐기겠다는 다짐이므로, 독립적 의사결정과 혼자 활동을 추구하겠다는 추론이 적절하다. ①은 '완전히 그만두다'라는 극단, ③은 모든 사람에 대한 일반화, ④는 장르 한정, ⑤는 후회 언급이 없다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my _________________. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
problems.explanation: 극장에 가면 친구나 가족과 함께 액션이나 SF 영화를 본다고 했다. ②는 선생님과 급우, ③은 온라인 팔로워, ④는 감독, ⑤는 개인 컬렉션으로 원문과 다르다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?

At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
problems.explanation: 혼자이기에 타인의 선호(preferences)를 걱정할 필요가 없었다. ①은 일정, ③은 반응, ④는 비용, ⑤는 불만으로 문맥과 맞지 않는다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?

At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
problems.explanation: 다른 것을 볼 좋은 기회(opportunity)로 보았다는 의미. ①은 핑계, ②는 의무, ④는 타협, ⑤는 대안으로 문맥상 부자연스럽다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely ________________ in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
problems.explanation: 영화가 시작되자 이야기에 완전히 몰입(absorbed)했다. become absorbed in = '~에 빠져들다'. ①은 혼란, ②는 실망, ④는 갇힌, ⑤는 의미가 비슷하나 become interested in은 원문의 '완전히 빠져든' 정도를 표현하지 못한다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to ___________________ more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
problems.explanation: 스스로 선택하겠다(make my own choices)는 다짐이다. ①은 친구 제안 따르기(반대), ②는 같은 극장 방문, ④는 역사 드라마 시청, ⑤는 붐비는 곳 피하기로 본문의 핵심 다짐과 다르다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?

After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
problems.explanation: 처음에는 어색하고(awkward) 외로웠다. ①은 자연스러운, ②는 스릴 있는, ④는 익숙한, ⑤는 편안한으로 처음 혼자 앉은 감정과 반대된다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to ________________. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: ask a friend to join me
stay home and watch a movie online
look for a less crowded theater
problems.explanation: 한 번도 해본 적 없는 일이었기에 '시도해 보기로 했다(give it a try)'. ①은 친구 동행 요청, ③은 집에서 보기, ④는 기회 기다리기, ⑤는 덜 붐비는 극장 찾기로 '도전'이라는 맥락과 맞지 않는다.

problems.instruction: 글의 흐름으로 보아, 주어진 문장이 들어가기에 가장 적절한 곳은?
problems.givenSentence: I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about.
problems.passage: Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. ( ① ) It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. ( ② ) I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. ( ③ ) At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. ( ④ )
problems.explanation: 타인의 선호를 걱정할 필요 없었다는 ⑦번 문장 뒤에, 그 경험을 기회로 삼아 다른 장르를 선택했다는 내용이 이어지는 것이 자연스럽다. 이후 극장에서 혼자 앉은 느낌으로 전환된다.

problems.instruction: 글의 흐름으로 보아, 주어진 문장이 들어가기에 가장 적절한 곳은?
problems.givenSentence: It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself.
problems.passage: At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. ( ① ) But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. ( ② ) There was nothing to distract me! ( ③ ) This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. ( ④ )
problems.explanation: 이야기에 완전히 몰입했다는 ⑩번 문장 뒤에, 영화 자체에 집중하는 것이 만족스러웠다는 내용이 이어지고, 이후 방해할 것이 없었다는 ⑫번으로 연결되는 것이 자연스럽다.

problems.instruction: 글의 흐름으로 보아, 주어진 문장이 들어가기에 가장 적절한 곳은?
problems.givenSentence: Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy.
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. ( ① ) However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. ( ② ) Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. ( ③ ) So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. ( ④ )
problems.explanation: 친구나 가족과 함께 액션이나 SF 영화를 본다는 ②번 문장 뒤에, '그것들이 그들이 즐기는 종류의 영화'라는 부연이 오는 것이 자연스럽다. Those는 앞의 action or science fiction movie를, they는 friends or family를 가리킨다.

problems.instruction: 주어진 글 다음에 이어질 글의 순서로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.givenStart: Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before.

chunks.A: It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences.
chunks.B: So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try.
chunks.C: I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about.

problems.explanation: (B) 한 번도 해본 적 없으므로 시도하기로 결정 → (A) 혼자 영화·좌석 선택이 좋았고 타인 선호를 걱정할 필요 없었음 → (C) 그 경험을 기회로 삼아 궁금했던 역사 드라마를 선택. 'give it a try' 후 구체적 경험, 그리고 영화 선택 순서가 논리적이다.

problems.instruction: 주어진 글 다음에 이어질 글의 순서로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.givenStart: I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about.

chunks.A: But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself.
chunks.B: At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself.
chunks.C: There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone.

problems.explanation: (B) 처음에는 어색하고 외로웠음 → (A) 그러나 영화가 시작되자 완전히 몰입, 집중이 만족스러웠음 → (C) 방해가 없었고, 혼자 하는 것도 즐길 수 있다는 깨달음. 'At first → But once → This experience' 순서로 감정 변화가 자연스럽다.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 내용과 일치하는 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: The writer frequently went to the theater alone before this challenge.
The writer felt completely relaxed from the moment they sat down alone.
The writer chose a historical drama for the solo movie experience.
The writer's friends and family recommended the historical drama.
The writer decided never to watch movies with others again after this experience.
problems.explanation: ⑧번 문장: 'I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about.' ②는 한 번도 해본 적 없다고 했으므로 불일치, ③은 처음에 어색했으므로 불일치, ④는 추천 언급 없음, ⑤는 다시는 같이 안 보겠다는 내용 없음.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 내용과 일치하지 않는 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: The writer was unable to concentrate on the movie because of loneliness.
The writer usually watches movies through streaming services these days.
Going to the theater alone was the writer's first challenge.
The writer felt awkward and lonely at first in the theater.
The writer resolved to make independent choices more frequently in the future.
problems.explanation: ⑩번 문장에서 영화가 시작되자 완전히 몰입했다고 하였고, ⑪에서 집중이 만족스러웠다고 했으므로 '외로움 때문에 집중하지 못했다'는 본문과 반대이다. 나머지는 모두 본문과 일치한다.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 내용과 일치하는 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: The writer chose the historical drama because a friend had highly recommended it.
The writer usually prefers historical dramas over action movies when watching with family.
The writer felt so lonely during the movie that they left the theater before it ended.
The writer had been wanting to see the historical drama but had not had the chance until now.
The writer had gone to the theater alone several times before this particular challenge.
problems.explanation: ⑧번 문장: 'a historical drama that I had been curious about' — 이전부터 궁금했지만 (친구·가족과 함께일 때는) 볼 기회가 없었다가 이번에 선택했다. ②는 친구 추천 없음, ③은 평소 가족과 역사 드라마를 본다는 내용 없음, ④는 끝까지 보았음, ⑤는 한 번도 해본 적 없었음.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 내용과 일치하지 않는 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: The writer tends to use streaming services to watch movies nowadays.
The writer remained uncomfortable and distracted throughout the entire movie.
The writer's friends and family enjoy action or science fiction movies.
The writer decided to try going to the theater alone as a challenge.
The writer promised to try making independent choices more often in the future.
problems.explanation: 처음에는 어색했지만(⑨) 영화가 시작되자 완전히 몰입했고(⑩), 방해될 것이 없어 만족스러웠다(⑪⑫). '영화 내내 불편하고 산만했다'는 본문과 반대이다. 나머지는 모두 일치한다.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 내용을 한 문장으로 요약하고자 한다. 빈칸 (A)와 (B)에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
problems.summaryTemplate: By going to the theater ____(A)____ for the first time, the writer discovered the joy of making independent choices and resolved to enjoy solo activities more ____(B)____.
problems.explanation: 혼자(alone) 극장에 처음 가서 독립적 선택의 기쁨을 발견하고 앞으로 더 자주(frequently) 혼자 활동을 즐기겠다고 다짐했다. ①의 새 친구, ③의 평일과 선별적, ④의 티켓 없이, ⑤의 마지못해(reluctantly)는 본문과 다르다.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 내용을 한 문장으로 요약하고자 한다. 빈칸 (A)와 (B)에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
problems.summaryTemplate: Although the writer initially felt ____(A)____, the experience of total immersion in the film led to the ____(B)____ that solo activities can be genuinely enjoyable.
problems.explanation: 처음에 불편했으나(uncomfortable) 영화에 완전히 몰입한 경험이 혼자 하는 활동이 즐거울 수 있다는 깨달음(realization)을 주었다. ①의 흥분, ③의 지루함, ④의 자신감과 추측, ⑤의 후회는 본문과 다르다.

problems.instruction: 밑줄 친 it이 가리키는 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie w<u>it</u>h my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies they enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: watching a historical drama at a theater
choosing a seat without asking anyone's opinion
using a streaming service instead of a theater
watching an action movie with friends or family
going to the movie theater by oneself
problems.explanation: it은 바로 앞 문장의 'Going to the theater alone'을 가리킨다. ①은 역사 드라마 관람, ③은 좌석 선택, ④는 스트리밍 이용, ⑤는 친구와 액션 영화 보기로 it의 지시 대상과 다르다.

problems.instruction: 밑줄 친 (a)와 (b)가 가리키는 대상이 바르게 짝지어진 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend to watch movies on streaming services. However, if I go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie with my friends or family. Those are the kinds of movies <u>they</u> enjoy. Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided to give it a try. It was nice to choose the movie and the seat on my own. I didn't have to worry about anyone else's preferences. I saw the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself. But once the movie started, I became completely absorbed in the story. It was so satisfying just to focus on the movie itself. There was nothing to distract me! This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone. After the movie, I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself in the future.
choices: (a) the writer's friends or family - (b) the writer
(a) other audience members - (b) the writer's teacher
(a) the writer's classmates - (b) the writer's family
(a) the writer's friends or family - (b) the writer's friends
problems.explanation: (a) they는 앞 문장의 'my friends or family'를 가리키고, (b) I는 글쓴이 자신을 가리킨다. 나머지 조합은 지시 대상을 잘못 연결한 것이다.

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 밑줄 친 부분 중, 어법상 틀린 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I ①<u>tend to watch</u> movies on streaming services. ②<u>Going</u> to the theater alone was something I had never done before. So, for the first challenge, I decided ③<u>giving</u> it a try. I saw the experience as a good opportunity ④<u>to watch</u> something different. This experience ⑤<u>made</u> me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone.
problems.explanation: decide + to-V이므로 giving → to give. ① tend to V ✓ ② 동명사 주어 ✓ ④ opportunity to V(형용사적 용법) ✓ ⑤ make + O + V원형(사역동사) ✓

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 밑줄 친 부분 중, 어법상 틀린 것은?
problems.passage: However, if I ①<u>go</u> to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie. ②<u>It was nice to choose</u> the movie and the seat on my own. I saw the experience ③<u>as</u> a good opportunity. At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely ④<u>sitting</u> in the theater by myself. I promised myself that I ⑤<u>would try</u> to make my own choices more often.
problems.explanation: it felt awkward to sit (가주어 it + 진주어 to부정사)이므로 sitting → to sit. ① if조건문에서 현재시제 ✓ ② 가주어 it + to부정사 ✓ ③ see A as B ✓ ⑤ would try(과거 미래) ✓

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 밑줄 친 부분 중, 어법상 틀린 것은?
problems.passage: Going to the theater alone was something I ①<u>had never done</u> before. I didn't ②<u>have to</u> worry about anyone else's preferences. But once the movie started, I became completely ③<u>absorbing</u> in the story. There was ④<u>nothing to distract</u> me! I promised myself that I would try to make my own choices more ⑤<u>often</u>.
problems.explanation: become absorbed in(~에 몰입하다)이므로 absorbing(능동/현재분사) → absorbed(수동/과거분사). 주어(I)가 몰입당하는 대상이므로 과거분사가 적절. ① 과거완료(경험) ✓ ② didn't have to ✓ ④ nothing to distract(후치수식) ✓ ⑤ often(부사) ✓

problems.instruction: 다음 글의 밑줄 친 부분 중, 어법상 틀린 것은?
problems.passage: These days, I tend ①<u>to watch</u> movies on streaming services. Those are the kinds of movies ②<u>which</u> they enjoy. I chose a historical drama that I ③<u>had been curious</u> about. It was so ④<u>satisfying</u> just to focus on the movie itself. This experience made me ⑤<u>to realize</u> that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone.
problems.explanation: 사역동사 make + O + V원형이므로 to realize → realize. ① tend to V ✓ ② 관계대명사 which(= that) ✓ ③ 과거완료진행(had been curious) ✓ ④ satisfying(감정유발 형용사) ✓

problems.instruction: 다음 중 밑줄 친 to부정사의 용법이 나머지 넷과 다른 것은?
choices: I decided <u>to give</u> it a try.
It was nice <u>to choose</u> the movie on my own.
I saw the experience as a good opportunity <u>to watch</u> something different.
It felt awkward <u>to sit</u> in the theater by myself.
I would try <u>to make</u> my own choices more often.
problems.explanation: ③은 형용사적 용법(opportunity를 후치수식). ①은 명사적 용법(decide의 목적어), ②④는 명사적 용법(가주어 it의 진주어), ⑤는 명사적 용법(try의 목적어). ③만 형용사적 용법으로 다르다.

problems.instruction: 다음 중 밑줄 친 that의 쓰임이 나머지 넷과 다른 것은?
choices: This experience made me realize <u>that</u> I sometimes enjoy doing things alone.
I promised myself <u>that</u> I would try to make my own choices.
She told us <u>that</u> we should share our experiences.
I believe <u>that</u> everyone needs time alone.
I chose a historical drama <u>that</u> I had been curious about.
problems.explanation: ①은 관계대명사 that(선행사 a historical drama를 수식), 나머지 ②③④⑤는 모두 접속사 that(명사절을 이끔). ①만 관계대명사로 쓰임이 다르다.

problems.instruction: 다음 중 밑줄 친 V-ing의 쓰임이 나머지 넷과 다른 것은?
choices: <u>Going</u> to the theater alone was something new.
problems.explanation: ①은 동명사 주어(문장의 주어 역할). ②③④⑤는 모두 동명사 목적어(동사의 목적어 역할). ①만 쓰임이 다르다.

problems.instruction: 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
problems.stem: These days, I tend watching movies on streaming services.
problems.explanation: tend + to-V (~하는 경향이 있다). tend는 to부정사를 목적어로 취하며 동명사를 쓸 수 없다.

problems.instruction: 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
problems.stem: However, if I will go to the theater, I usually watch an action or science fiction movie.
problems.explanation: if 조건문(조건 부사절)에서는 미래 시제 대신 현재 시제를 사용한다. 습관적 조건을 나타내므로 현재시제 go가 적절하다.

problems.instruction: 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
problems.stem: Go to the theater alone was something I had never done before.
problems.explanation: 주어 자리에 동사원형이 올 수 없다. 동명사(Going)를 써서 '혼자 극장에 가는 것'이라는 주어를 만들어야 한다.

problems.instruction: 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
problems.stem: So, for the first challenge, I decided giving it a try.
problems.explanation: decide + to-V (~하기로 결정하다). decide는 to부정사를 목적어로 취하며 동명사를 쓸 수 없다.

problems.instruction: 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
problems.stem: It was nice choosing the movie and the seat on my own.
problems.explanation: 가주어 It + be + 형용사 + to-V (진주어) 구문이다. It was nice to choose가 올바른 형태.

problems.instruction: 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
problems.stem: I saw the experience for a good opportunity to watch something different.
problems.explanation: see A as B = 'A를 B로 여기다'. see는 전치사 as와 함께 쓰인다. for는 부적절.

problems.instruction: 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
problems.stem: But once the movie started, I became completely absorbing in the story.
problems.explanation: become absorbed in = '~에 몰입하다'. 주어(I)가 몰입당하는 대상이므로 과거분사 absorbed를 써야 한다. absorbing은 '(무엇이) 흥미진진한'이라는 능동적 의미의 현재분사이다.

problems.instruction: 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
problems.stem: This experience made me to realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone.
problems.explanation: 사역동사 make + 목적어 + 동사원형. make는 목적격 보어로 to부정사가 아닌 원형부정사를 취한다.

problems.instruction: 주어진 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하시오.
problems.stem: 혼자 극장에 가는 것은 내가 이전에 한 번도 해본 적 없는 일이었다.
problems.answer: Going to the theater alone was something I had never done before.
problems.explanation: Going to(동명사 주어) + the theater alone / was something(보어) / I had never done before(관계절, 과거완료-경험)

problems.instruction: 주어진 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
problems.answer: the experience as a good opportunity to watch something different, so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious
problems.explanation: see A as B: the experience as a good opportunity / to부정사 형용사적 용법: to watch something different / 접속사 so + 관계대명사 that: so I chose a historical drama that I had been curious about

problems.instruction: 주어진 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하시오.
problems.stem: 처음에는 혼자 극장에 앉아 있는 것이 조금 어색하고 외로웠다.
problems.answer: At first, it felt a bit awkward and lonely to sit in the theater by myself.
problems.explanation: At first(부사구) / it felt(가주어) + a bit awkward and lonely(보어) / to sit(진주어) + in the theater by myself(부사구)

problems.instruction: 주어진 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하시오.
problems.stem: 이 경험은 내가 때때로 혼자 일을 하는 것을 즐긴다는 것을 깨닫게 해주었다.
problems.answer: This experience made me realize that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone.
problems.explanation: make + O + V원형: made me realize / that절: that I sometimes enjoy / enjoy + V-ing: doing things alone

problems.instruction: 주어진 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
problems.stem: After the movie, I promised _________________________________ in the future.
problems.answer: myself that I would try to make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities by myself
problems.explanation: promise oneself that: myself that / would + V: I would try to make / 병렬구조: make my own choices more often and enjoy more activities / by myself(혼자서)

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말의 형태로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: These days, I tend _______ (watch) movies on streaming services.
problems.explanation: tend + to-V. tend는 to부정사를 목적어로 취한다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말의 형태로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: So, for the first challenge, I decided _______ (give) it a try.
problems.explanation: decide + to-V. decide는 to부정사를 목적어로 취한다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말의 형태로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: It was nice _______ (choose) the movie and the seat on my own.
problems.explanation: 가주어 It + be + 형용사 + to-V (진주어). '~하는 것이 좋았다'의 구문이다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말의 형태로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: But once the movie started, I became completely _______ (absorb) in the story.
problems.explanation: become absorbed in = '~에 몰입하다'. 주어가 감정을 느끼는 대상이므로 과거분사 absorbed가 적절. absorbing은 '흥미진진한'이라는 능동 의미.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말의 형태로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: This experience made me _______ (realize) that I sometimes enjoy doing things alone.
problems.explanation: 사역동사 make + 목적어 + 동사원형. make는 원형부정사를 목적격 보어로 취한다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말의 형태로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: I sometimes enjoy _______ (do) things alone.
problems.explanation: enjoy + V-ing. enjoy는 동명사를 목적어로 취하며 to부정사는 쓸 수 없다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말의 형태로 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: I promised myself that I _______ (try) to make my own choices more often in the future.
problems.explanation: 주절이 과거(promised)이므로 that절에서 미래를 나타낼 때 would를 사용한다(시제 일치). will try는 현재 시점에서의 미래이므로 과거 문맥에 부적절.
